title: Trichotosia lagunensis
intro: Trichotosia lagunensis is a species of orchid native to the Philippines, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Trichotosia lagunensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infused as a tea, and is commonly used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
